templates.title: Standard rectangular steel-frame dining table
templates.subtitle: Simple repeatable rectangular dining table with workshop timber, Westimber lamination, and steel-frame fit/check.

suggestedTasks.title: Order/spec/payment/customer promise checked
suggestedTasks.note: Check the order is loaded, spec is clear, payment evidence is present, and customer promise is realistic before workshop trust.

suggestedTasks.title: Production spec and workshop timber confirmed
suggestedTasks.note: Confirm production spec, steel-frame details, species, finish, and workshop timber availability before sending supplier POs. For rimu/tōtara, confirm the Timbers of NZ timber PO if required; for beech/in-stock timber, keep the process on the simple workshop-stock path.

suggestedTasks.title: Send Tube Fab PO
suggestedTasks.note: Send the purchase order to Tube Fab for the steel components, frame, or base.

suggestedTasks.title: Send Westimber PO / lamination confirmation
suggestedTasks.note: Send the Westimber purchase order or confirm the lamination job/spec before timber leaves the workshop.

suggestedTasks.title: Pull timber from workshop
suggestedTasks.note: Pull the selected workshop timber and strap it ready for Westimber.

suggestedTasks.title: Timber to Westimber for lamination
suggestedTasks.note: Get the strapped timber to Westimber against the confirmed lamination job.

suggestedTasks.title: Westimber lamination wait
suggestedTasks.note: Planning gate only. Westimber laminated panels are about 2 weeks after PO/spec confirmation.

suggestedTasks.title: Receive/check laminated top back at workshop
suggestedTasks.note: Check the laminated top is back, sound, correctly sized, and ready for workshop processing.

suggestedTasks.title: Stress cuts + C-channels
suggestedTasks.note: Make stress cuts and fit/check C-channels before sanding and coating.

suggestedTasks.title: Bottom prep
suggestedTasks.note: Choose bottom face, prep underside, and resolve insert/flat-pack details if needed.

suggestedTasks.title: Bottom coat
suggestedTasks.note: Sand and coat the underside before top-side finishing.

suggestedTasks.title: Sand top/sides/edges
suggestedTasks.note: Fill defects, sand top/sides/ends, arise edges, remove dust, and check under light.

suggestedTasks.title: First coat
suggestedTasks.note: Apply first coat after final surface prep.

suggestedTasks.title: Second coat
suggestedTasks.note: Allow at least one working day between coats; two is better where possible.

suggestedTasks.title: Final coat
suggestedTasks.note: Clear finish is normally three clear coats total. Blackwash uses two stain coats plus two clear coats.

suggestedTasks.title: Cure
suggestedTasks.note: Planning gate only. Let finish cure before final handling; a full week is better where possible.

suggestedTasks.title: QC + photos
suggestedTasks.note: Final proof photos, spec check, finish check, and customer-ready quality review.

suggestedTasks.title: Fit/check steel frame/base/assembly
suggestedTasks.note: Fit or check the steel frame/base and confirm assembly before packing.

suggestedTasks.title: Box/pack/wrap
suggestedTasks.note: Protect the top/base for freight, delivery, or collection.

suggestedTasks.title: Balance invoice/payment release check
suggestedTasks.note: Issue/check balance invoice and confirm payment release before the order leaves.

suggestedTasks.title: Book freight/delivery or customer collection
suggestedTasks.note: Book freight/delivery or confirm customer collection details.

suggestedTasks.title: Customer update
suggestedTasks.note: Guido sends the confirmed dispatch, delivery, or collection update.

templates.issueLabel: Dining table path aligned to SOP-level production events

templates.title: Dining table - non-standard shape
templates.subtitle: Danish oval, classic oval, pebble, organic, or custom shape.
detection: Shape not rectangle / square / round / pill
Precision Woodworks CNC adds about 2 weeks

suggestedTasks.title: Order Loaded
suggestedTasks.note: Check invoice, spec, payment evidence, promised due date, supplier needs, and delivery method before workshop trust.

suggestedTasks.title: POs sent
suggestedTasks.note: Confirm required purchase orders and supplier requirements before workshop work starts.

suggestedTasks.title: Timber pulled
suggestedTasks.note: Pull timber and strap it ready for Westimber collection/laminating where required.

suggestedTasks.title: Westimber lamination wait
suggestedTasks.note: Planning gate only. Westimber laminated panels are about 2 weeks after PO/spec confirmation.

suggestedTasks.title: Precision Woodworks CNC
suggestedTasks.note: Non-standard shapes go to Precision Woodworks after Westimber.

suggestedTasks.title: Precision CNC wait
suggestedTasks.note: Planning gate only. Precision Woodworks CNC shape cutting adds about 2 weeks after Westimber.

suggestedTasks.title: Book Pinpoint return
suggestedTasks.note: Book Pinpoint to return CNC-cut panel(s) from Precision Woodworks to the workshop.

suggestedTasks.title: Materials received
suggestedTasks.note: Confirm CNC-cut panel(s), base, hardware, and ordered materials are in hand.

suggestedTasks.title: Bottom prep
suggestedTasks.note: SOP stage: check size/colour, choose bottom face, L-channel cuts if required, stress cuts, inserts if flat-packed.

suggestedTasks.title: Bottom coat
suggestedTasks.note: SOP stage: sand sides/ends/bottom, arise edges, remove dust, apply and wipe back bottom coat, insert L-channel if required.

suggestedTasks.title: Sand top
suggestedTasks.note: SOP stage: fill defects, sand top/sides/ends, arise top edge, remove dust, check under light.

suggestedTasks.title: Sand and coat
suggestedTasks.note: Clear finish route: first clear coat after final surface prep.

suggestedTasks.title: Second coat
suggestedTasks.note: Allow at least one working day between coats; two is better where possible.

suggestedTasks.title: 3rd coat (clear final)
suggestedTasks.note: Clear finish route: third/final clear coat. Blackwash needs two stain coats plus two clear coats instead.

suggestedTasks.title: Curing
suggestedTasks.note: Planning gate only. SOP says cure for 1 week; Tuesday rule keeps at least 2 working days minimum.

suggestedTasks.title: QC + photos
suggestedTasks.note: Final proof photos, spec check, and customer-ready quality review.

suggestedTasks.title: Assemble / box
suggestedTasks.note: Assemble for local delivery or prepare the piece for final protection.

suggestedTasks.title: Pack / wrap
suggestedTasks.note: Boxing SOP: foam, MDF/cardboard protection, delivery docs, warning labels, and finished-stage update.

suggestedTasks.title: Balance invoice
suggestedTasks.note: Guido issues/checks the balance invoice before release.

suggestedTasks.title: Book freight / delivery
suggestedTasks.note: Guido books freight or confirms local delivery/collection details for now.

suggestedTasks.title: Confirm paid before release
suggestedTasks.note: Guido confirms balance/payment is paid before the order leaves or is collected.

suggestedTasks.title: Customer update
suggestedTasks.note: Guido sends the confirmed dispatch, delivery, or collection update.

templates.issueLabel: CNC path includes Westimber, Precision, and Pinpoint gates

templates.title: Panel / benchtop
templates.subtitle: Standard panel production without a custom table-shape route.
detection: No table base dependency unless explicit

suggestedTasks.title: Order Loaded
suggestedTasks.note: Spec/payment/customer promise checked before workshop trust.

templates.issueLabel: Panel rules need the same source-of-truth builder as tables

templates.title: Supply-only / customer collection
templates.subtitle: Supplier pickup or customer collection where workshop production is not needed.
detection: Completion can happen from order popup
templates.issueLabel: Needs its own short order flow

templates.title: Samples
templates.subtitle: Sample requests and follow-up.
detection: Sample stage from sample-specific status/top-panel fields
